title: Hozier, Jessie Buckley and Bruce Springsteen record Shane MacGowan tribute album
summary_full: The album will also feature Primal Scream, David Gray, Jessie Buckley, Johnny Depp and Kate Moss.
summary_public: The album will also feature Primal Scream, David Gray, Jessie Buckley, Johnny Depp and Kate Moss.
